segments: كَفَرَ بِاللَّهِ مَنْ تَبَرَّأَ مِنْ نَسَبٍ وَ إِنْ دَقَّ .
arabic.text: كَفَرَ بِاللَّهِ مَنْ تَبَرَّأَ مِنْ نَسَبٍ وَ إِنْ دَقَّ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘He has disbelieved in Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, the one who disavows from a lineage, and even if it was lowly’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘He has disbelieved in Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, the one who disavows from a lineage, and even if it was lowly’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘It is to disbelieve Allah to disown one’s lineage even though it (the lineage) is very lowly.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘It is to disbelieve Allah to disown one’s lineage even though it (the lineage) is very lowly.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/376)
gradings.label: حسن كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/376)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

segments: كَفَرَ بِاللَّهِ مَنْ تَبَرَّأَ مِنْ نَسَبٍ وَ إِنْ دَقَّ .
arabic.text: كَفَرَ بِاللَّهِ مَنْ تَبَرَّأَ مِنْ نَسَبٍ وَ إِنْ دَقَّ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Abu Al Magra, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘He has disbelieved in Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, the one who disavows from a lineage, and even if it was lowly’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Abu Al Magra, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘He has disbelieved in Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, the one who disavows from a lineage, and even if it was lowly’.

segments: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from abu al-Maghra’ from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘It is to disbelieve Allah to disown one’s lineage even though it is very lowly.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from abu al-Maghra’ from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘It is to disbelieve Allah to disown one’s lineage even though it is very lowly.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/376)
gradings.label: موثق كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/376)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْمَغْرَاءِ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

segments: ا كُفْرٌ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ الِانْتِفَاءُ مِنْ حَسَبٍ وَ إِنْ دَقَّ .
arabic.text: ا كُفْرٌ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ الِانْتِفَاءُ مِنْ حَسَبٍ وَ إِنْ دَقَّ .

segments: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Salih Bin Abu Hammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, and Ibn Fazzal, from various men,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> and Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that they<sup>asws</sup> both said: ‘It is disbelief in Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Magnificent, the disowning of a lineage, and even if it was lowly’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Muhammad, from Salih Bin Abu Hammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, and Ibn Fazzal, from various men,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> and Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that they<sup>asws</sup> both said: ‘It is disbelief in Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Magnificent, the disowning of a lineage, and even if it was lowly’.

segments: 3. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Salih ibn abu Hammad from ibn abu ‘Umayr from and ibn Faddal from various people from abu Ja’far and abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who have said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘It is to disbelieve Allah, the Most Great, to disown one’s lineage even though it is very lowly. ’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Salih ibn abu Hammad from ibn abu ‘Umayr from and ibn Faddal from various people from abu Ja’far and abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who have said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘It is to disbelieve Allah, the Most Great, to disown one’s lineage even though it is very lowly. ’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/376)
gradings.label: ضعيف
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/376)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ أَبِي حَمَّادٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ وَ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ رِجَالٍ شَتَّى عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ وَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُمَا قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُمَا
